zh.lifeSummary: 當Radulf de Brimeu於1123年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布利時，他的父親Jean de Brimeux19歲，母親Louise of Montcavrel28歲。他於1148年9月19日與Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu在法國皮卡迪索姆阿別維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1173年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brimeu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably a variant, via Brimner, of the ethnic name Bremner , denoting someone from Brabant in the Low Countries.

variants.name: Bremner
meanings: Scottish: habitational name for someone from Brabant in the Low Countries, from Older Scots Brebner, Brabanare ‘native or inhabitant of Brabant’ (see Brabant and compare with the synonymous Brabazon ). Weavers from Brabant settled early at Aberdeen and on the east coast of Scotland.
German: habitational name for someone from the city of Bremen. This surname is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Radulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, Reginulfr, derived from regin ‘advice, decision’ + úlfr ‘wolf’. This was introduced into Scotland and northern England by Scandinavian settlers in the early Middle Ages and modern use is largely confined to these areas.

en.lifeSummary: When Radulf de Brimeu was born in 1123, in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Jean de Brimeux, was 19 and his mother, Louise of Montcavrel, was 28. He married Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu on 19 September 1148, in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1173, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Radulf de Brimeu est né en 1123, à Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Jean de Brimeux, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Louise of Montcavrel, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu le 19 septembre 1148, à Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1173, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Radulf de Brimeu 1123 in Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Brimeux 19 und seine Mutter Louise of Montcavrel 28. Er hat am 19. September 1148 in Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1173 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Radulf de Brimeu è nato il nel 1123 nel Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Brimeux, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Louise of Montcavrel, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu il 19 settembre 1148, nel Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1173, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Radulf de Brimeuが1123年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスブリメウックスで生まれた時，父Jean de Brimeuxは19歳，母Louise of Montcavrelは28歳であった。1148年9月19日にフランスピカーディソンメアベヴィルでBlanche de Montgomery de Ponthieuと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1173年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Radulf de Brimeu(이)가 1123년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 브라임우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Brimeux(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Louise of Montcavrel(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1148년 9월 19일 프랑스 피카디 솜 애브베빌에서 Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1173년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Radulf de Brimeu nasceu em 1123, em Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Jean de Brimeux, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Louise of Montcavrel, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu em 19 de setembro de 1148, em Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1173, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Radulf de Brimeu родился в 1123 г. в местности бримеукс, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Brimeux было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Louise of Montcavrel, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu 19 сентября 1148 г. в местности эббевилл, сомм, пикарди, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1173 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Radulf de Brimeu nació en 1123, en Brimeux, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Jean de Brimeux, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Louise of Montcavrel, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Blanche de Montgomery de Ponthieu el 19 de septiembre de 1148, en Abbeville, Somme, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1173, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
